item.title: AI Tokens: The New Signing Bonus or Just a Cost of Doing Business?
item.description: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus for developers, or just another cost of doing business? This article explores the implications and potential benefits of AI token programs in the tech industry.

item.title: Deploy Production Generative AI at the Edge Using Amazon EKS Hybrid Nodes with NVIDIA DGX
item.description: Learn how to deploy production generative AI models at the edge using AWS, specifically leveraging Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) hybrid nodes and NVIDIA's DGX system. This post covers the process of setting up a robust infrastructure for edge computing.
